---
name: Hardware Issue
about: Report a hardware design issue or suggest a PCB improvement
title: "[HARDWARE] "
labels: hardware
assignees: ''
---

## Description
Describe the hardware issue or improvement.

## Board Variant
- [ ] Generic Servo Board (CP2119)
- [ ] MG996 Drop-in Board (BDR6121H)
- [ ] Both

## Category
- [ ] Schematic issue
- [ ] PCB layout issue
- [ ] BOM / component issue
- [ ] EMI / noise issue
- [ ] Thermal issue
- [ ] Mechanical / form factor

## Details
Provide as much detail as possible. Include:
- Affected components or nets
- Measurements (voltage, current, temperature) if applicable
- Oscilloscope/logic analyzer captures if available

## Suggested Fix
If you have a proposed solution, describe it here.
